tasks.instruction: From the facilities and certifications section, identify a currently active production facility that holds both ISO 9001 and ISO 14001 certifications and supports RoHS-compliant materials, then start a quote request specifically for that facility ensuring the auto-copied RoHS compliance note remains in the form and submit it with your project and contact details, including a target delivery date within the next year.

expected_values.rohs_note_text: This facility is qualified to process only RoHS-compliant materials and maintains documented traceability for all supplied metal stock and finishes.

tasks.instruction: In the material selection tool for an outdoor structural bracket with a batch size of 300 parts, compare at least three different candidate materials, then choose one that has a corrosion resistance rating of 4 or higher and an estimated cost per part of $12 or less and start a quote using that material with a descriptive part name.

tasks.instruction: In the assembly configuration tool for a metal support frame with a quantity of 500 units, compare welding, bolted, and riveted assembly methods, then select a method that is marked as disassemblable and has an assembly cost per unit below $5 and save this configuration to the project with a descriptive name.

target_names: Bolted assembly using hex bolts and lock washers, allowing repeatable disassembly and reassembly for maintenance or relocation.

tasks.instruction: From the laser cutting technical data or FAQ section, find the maximum sheet size supported, then start a laser cutting quote request and include that maximum sheet size value in the project notes before submitting.

target_names: Maximum sheet size for flat laser cutting

expected_values.notes: Include panels up to the maximum sheet size of 3000 mm x 1500 mm as listed in your technical data.
